channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jeffries says Democrats haven't ruled out impeachment if they win Congress
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries stated Sunday that Democrats have not excluded the possibility of impeaching President Trump should they gain control of the House and Senate in November.

item.title: A Cook in the Wild
item.description: Equipped with a knife, a pot, a spoon, and a single butane stove.

item.title: Yes, We Should Teach Students What to Think
item.description: A truly neutral education would overlook many core principles that educators typically assume.

item.title: Former Senate leader Mitch McConnell hospitalized, details scarce
item.description: Republican Senator Mitch McConnell was admitted to a hospital on Sunday, his spokesperson confirmed, but no details about the reason were immediately available.
